star_1.text: I played this app and really liked it at first, but the races are very inconsistent. I would pass an obstacle and then fail then next one, so I'd have to retry, then I'd use the exact same method and fail to complete the first obstacle. Many of the obstacle are so hard there is 0 room for error and it just gets so frustrating that it's not fun anymore. I have used other obstacle race apps and this is the worst of them all.

Ads are up to 5 sec., so it's not that intrusive and they give you jems for upgrade. Game update needed for those (like me) who purchase all the players and victory dances, so now jems just sitting arround and can not buy anything else with it. Revision ; 28.08.2020., no app update to spend jems, no stars.

Update: Even though this is still one of the best games for Android in my opinion, it doesn't work for Android 13 unfortunately and One UI 5.1. Hyper Run works only on the older software. I think it works on Android 9 point something 🤔. If you install the game on newer software such as android 13, it will crash.
